metadata.title: AI Video Generator | Text, Image & Ref - mogged
metadata.description: Generate AI videos with mogged using text-to-video, image-to-video, and reference-to-video workflows for concept drafts and shot control.
metadata.keywords: ai video generator, text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, {{app_domain}}

page.title: AI Video Generator Workspace
page.description: AI Video Generator workspace with three clean entries: text-to-video, image-to-video, and reference-to-video.

generator.title: AI Video Generator Workspace
generator.description: Run text-to-video, image-to-video, and reference-to-video generation from the same hosted mogged video workspace.

form.prompt_placeholder: Example: A cinematic product reveal in a dark studio, precise push-in camera movement, controlled highlights on brushed metal, immersive ambient sound, premium advertising mood.
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content
form.translation_no_change: Prompt already looks ready in English.
form.translation_stale: You changed the prompt while translation was running, so we kept your latest version.
form.rewrite_prompt_hint: We can rewrite this into a safer prompt while keeping the core visual intent. Review it before generating again.
form.rewrite_prompt_success: Safer prompt ready. Review it and generate again.
form.rewrite_prompt_no_change: We could not improve this prompt automatically. Please revise it manually.
form.rewrite_prompt_stale: You changed the prompt while optimization was running, so we kept your latest version.
form.rewrite_prompt_failed: Automatic prompt optimization failed. Please try again.
form.copy_failed: Could not copy the prompt. Please copy it manually.
form.paste_failed: Clipboard access is unavailable. Please paste with your keyboard shortcut.
form.workflow_runtime_hint: These are the shared controls across all three workflow lanes.
form.fast_hint: Uses the faster route when available.
form.generate_audio_hint: Include synchronized audio when the provider supports it.
form.web_search_hint: Allow the provider to call web search for current information when supported.
form.return_last_frame_hint: Available only on supported routes. Returns the generated ending frame so you can chain the next shot more precisely.
form.first_frame_hint: Upload a first frame or paste one public image URL. Private and share-page links will fail.
form.last_frame_hint: Upload an ending frame or paste one public image URL if you want the motion to land on a target shot.
form.reference_images_placeholder: One public image URL per line. Up to 9 images.
form.reference_videos_placeholder: One public video URL per line. Up to 3 videos.
form.reference_audios_placeholder: One public audio URL per line. Up to 3 audio files.
form.first_frame_required: Please provide at least the first frame image.
form.reference_required: Reference mode needs at least one image or video reference.
form.image_url_invalid: Invalid image URL. Please use a direct https:// image link.
form.image_url_video: This link does not point to a usable image file. Use a direct image URL instead of a video or download page.
form.image_url_cloud_drive: Cloud-drive and social share links are blocked here. Upload the image or use a direct public image URL instead.
form.image_url_private: This image URL looks private or local. Use a public direct image URL instead.
form.image_url_too_many: Only one image URL is allowed in each frame field. Put the opening shot in First Frame and the optional ending shot in Last Frame.
form.video_url_invalid: Invalid video URL. Please use a direct public http(s) video link.
form.video_url_media_type: This link does not point to a usable video file. Use a direct public video URL instead.
form.video_url_cloud_drive: Cloud-drive and social share links are blocked here. Upload the video or use a direct public video URL instead.
form.video_url_private: This video URL looks private or local. Use a public direct video URL instead.
form.video_url_too_many: You can add up to 3 public video URLs here.
form.audio_url_invalid: Invalid audio URL. Please use a direct public http(s) audio link.
form.audio_url_media_type: This link does not point to a usable audio file. Use a direct public audio URL instead.
form.audio_url_cloud_drive: Cloud-drive and social share links are blocked here. Upload the audio or use a direct public audio URL instead.
form.audio_url_private: This audio URL looks private or local. Use a public direct audio URL instead.
form.audio_url_too_many: You can add up to 3 public audio URLs here.
form.notifications_hint: Useful for longer queue times. We keep the current task switch separate from your future default.
form.notify_on_completion: Email me when this task is ready
form.notify_on_completion_hint: We send the prompt, task page link, and a direct download shortcut when the render finishes.
form.notify_on_completion_by_default: Use this for future tasks too
form.notify_on_completion_by_default_hint: Save this as your default so new tasks start with notifications already enabled.

generator.sample_preview_description: A sample clip stays here until you run your first generation.
generator.error_nsfw_blocked: This request was blocked by safety filters. Please try a safer prompt.
generator.error_input_validation: Generation failed: the provider rejected the request parameters. Please simplify the prompt or adjust the inputs.
generator.error_image_url_access: Reference media could not be loaded. Make sure each URL is public, direct, and not expired.
generator.error_invalid_image_url: The URL you entered is not a valid image link.
generator.error_retrying: Media loading issue detected. Retrying automatically ({current}/{max})...
generator.error_retry_exhausted: Media loading failed after {count} retries. Please verify the URLs and try again.
generator.error_unknown: Generation failed due to a temporary network or service issue. Please try again.
generator.error_no_result: The provider returned no result. Please retry with a different prompt.
generator.task_submitted_detail: We refresh automatically when the result is ready. Reference-heavy jobs can sit in queue longer than text-only jobs.
generator.task_completion_notification_scheduled: We will email this task's prompt, task page link, and first download shortcut when the result is ready.
generator.activity_link_hint: You can view all your tasks anytime at

status.pending: Waiting for the job to start

generator.task_still_processing: Still processing on server. We keep polling, you can leave and check later.
generator.create_task_failed: Failed to create a video task
generator.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep creating.
generator.prompt_required: Please enter a prompt before generating.
generator.download_fetch_failed: Failed to fetch the media file
generator.error_provider_unavailable: This generator is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
generator.error_invalid_request: We couldn't submit this request. Check the prompt and inputs, then try again.
generator.error_rate_limited: Too many attempts in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.
generator.error_request_failed: Generation could not be completed. Please try again.
generator.error_request_processing: This same request is already processing. Please wait a moment before trying again.
generator.error_reference_unsupported: This reference media is not supported in the current workflow. Replace it and try again.
